# MuleSoft Visualizer

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version of Visualizer documentation.
> See [Visualizer llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/visualizer/llms-full.txt) for all the Visualizer documentation in one file.

## Content

- [API Visualizer Architecture Visualization](https://docs.mulesoft.com/visualizer/architecture-visualization.md)
- [CloudHub Setup in API Visualizer](https://docs.mulesoft.com/visualizer/cloudhub-setup.md)
- [Supported Connection-Level Metrics in API Visualizer](https://docs.mulesoft.com/visualizer/connection-metrics-compatibility.md)
- [Customize the API Visualizer Canvas](https://docs.mulesoft.com/visualizer/customize-your-canvas.md)
- [API Visualizer Overview](https://docs.mulesoft.com/visualizer/index.md)
- [Using Layers in API Visualizer](https://docs.mulesoft.com/visualizer/layers.md)
- [Managing Performance and Data Collection](https://docs.mulesoft.com/visualizer/manage-performance.md)
- [Viewing Policies in API Visualizer](https://docs.mulesoft.com/visualizer/policy-visualization.md)
- [Runtime Fabric Setup](https://docs.mulesoft.com/visualizer/runtime-fabric-setup.md)
- [Set up API Visualizer](https://docs.mulesoft.com/visualizer/setup.md)
- [Standalone Mule Setup](https://docs.mulesoft.com/visualizer/standalone-mule-setup.md)
- [Troubleshooting API Visualizer](https://docs.mulesoft.com/visualizer/troubleshoot-visualizer.md)
- [Troubleshooting App Visualization](https://docs.mulesoft.com/visualizer/troubleshooting-visualization.md)
- [Using Tags in API Visualizer](https://docs.mulesoft.com/visualizer/use-tags-in-visualizer.md)
- [Defining a View in API Visualizer](https://docs.mulesoft.com/visualizer/view.md)
- [Use-Case Specific Visualizations](https://docs.mulesoft.com/visualizer/visualizer-app-network.md)
